title: BEM-780 restore mailbox handoff
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:35 (UTC+3)'
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/CLAUDE_MAILBOX_FILE_HANDOFF_MODE.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-780 | Claude Mailbox File-Handoff Mode'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: ACTIVE_UNTIL_REAL_CLAUDE_RUNTIME_PROVEN'+sep+sep+'## Почему'+sep+'Ранее согласование с Claude было подтверждено committed mailbox/file artifacts. Live Claude runtime wake-up сейчас не доказан. Попытки добавить новые workflows создали повторяющийся workflow-lint-gate failure loop.'+sep+sep+'## Правило'+sep+'До отдельного proof реального Claude runtime запрещено создавать новые active `.github/workflows/*claude*` для wake-up. Работа идёт через file/mailbox handoff: GPT пишет запрос в `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/`; ответ считается полученным только когда появляется committed файл в `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/` или `external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/`.'+sep+sep+'## PASS'+sep+'PASS по согласованию допускается только при наличии реального файла ответа Claude с Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Fallback/blocker reports не являются approval.'+sep)
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem780_file_handoff_protocol_decision_required.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-780 | CLAUDE FILE-HANDOFF REQUEST | FINAL DECISION REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: FILE_HANDOFF_DECISION_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude/Internal Auditor, previous live runtime wake-up experiments are quarantined because they caused workflow-lint-gate failures. Please respond by committing a file into `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/`.'+sep+sep+'Required answer:'+sep+'1. Why previous mailbox response did not appear.'+sep+'2. Final decision for multi-agent architecture protocol: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+'3. Required changes or blocker.'+sep+sep+'Required response filename: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem780_claude_file_handoff_response.md`.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'```'+sep+'BEM-780 | CLAUDE FILE-HANDOFF RESPONSE'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Why no previous response: ...'+sep+'Runtime/trigger conclusion: ...'+sep+'Required changes: ...'+sep+'Final recommendation: ...'+sep+'```'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem780_wait_for_real_file_handoff_response.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-780 Next | Wait for real file-handoff response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Monitor mailbox for `bem780_claude_file_handoff_response.md` or equivalent real Claude response. Do not create new workflows. Do not fake approval.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-780 FILE-HANDOFF MODE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'File-handoff request created. Monitor `claude_to_gpt` for real committed response. Do not create new Claude workflows until runtime proof is planned separately.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'restore_file_mailbox_handoff_mode.v1','bem':'BEM-780','status':'file_handoff_mode_restored','protocol':str(protocol),'mailbox_request':str(mail),'blocker':{'code':'REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PENDING','message':'Awaiting real committed Claude mailbox response; approval not yet received.'},'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem780_restore_file_mailbox_handoff_mode.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem780_restore_file_mailbox_handoff_mode.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-780 | Restore File Mailbox Handoff Mode | ACTIVE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Mailbox request: '+str(mail)+sep+'Blocker: REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PENDING'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem780_restore_file_mailbox_handoff_mode','status':'file_handoff_mode_restored','mailbox_request':str(mail),'blocker':'REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PENDING','created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem780_restore_file_mailbox_handoff_mode.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-780 restored file/mailbox handoff mode and created final decision request.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(mail),str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Restored Claude file/mailbox handoff mode, banned new active Claude wake-up workflows until proof, and created new final decision mailbox request')
"""
